CVE-2012-6139.title: libxslt before 1.1.28 allows remote attackers to cause a denial o ...
CVE-2012-6139.description: libxslt before 1.1.28 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (NULL pointer dereference and crash) via an (1) empty match attribute in a XSL key to the xsltAddKey function in keys.c or (2) uninitialized variable to the xsltDocumentFunction function in functions.c.

CVE-2015-7995.title: The xsltStylePreCompute function in preproc.c in libxslt 1.1.28 d ...
CVE-2015-7995.description: The xsltStylePreCompute function in preproc.c in libxslt 1.1.28 does not check if the parent node is an element, which allows attackers to cause a denial of service via a crafted XML file, related to a "type confusion" issue.

CVE-2016-1683.title: numbers.c in libxslt before 1.1.29, as used in Google Chrome befo ...
CVE-2016-1683.description: numbers.c in libxslt before 1.1.29, as used in Google Chrome before 51.0.2704.63, mishandles namespace nodes, which allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (out-of-bounds heap memory access) or possibly have unspecified other impact via a crafted document.

CVE-2016-1684.title: numbers.c in libxslt before 1.1.29, as used in Google Chrome befo ...
CVE-2016-1684.description: numbers.c in libxslt before 1.1.29, as used in Google Chrome before 51.0.2704.63, mishandles the i format token for xsl:number data, which allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (integer overflow or resource consumption) or possibly have unspecified other impact via a crafted document.

CVE-2016-1841.title: libxslt, as used in Apple iOS before 9.3.2, OS X before 10.11.5,  ...
CVE-2016-1841.description: libxslt, as used in Apple iOS before 9.3.2, OS X before 10.11.5, tvOS before 9.2.1, and watchOS before 2.2.1, allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code or cause a denial of service (memory corruption) via a crafted web site.

CVE-2016-4607.title: libxslt in Apple iOS before 9.3.3, OS X before 10.11.6, iTunes be ...
CVE-2016-4607.description: libxslt in Apple iOS before 9.3.3, OS X before 10.11.6, iTunes before 12.4.2 on Windows, iCloud before 5.2.1 on Windows, tvOS before 9.2.2, and watchOS before 2.2.2 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (memory corruption) or possibly have unspecified other impact via unknown vectors, a different vulnerability than CVE-2016-4608, CVE-2016-4609, CVE-2016-4610, and CVE-2016-4612.

CVE-2016-4608.title: libxslt in Apple iOS before 9.3.3, OS X before 10.11.6, iTunes be ...
CVE-2016-4608.description: libxslt in Apple iOS before 9.3.3, OS X before 10.11.6, iTunes before 12.4.2 on Windows, iCloud before 5.2.1 on Windows, tvOS before 9.2.2, and watchOS before 2.2.2 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (memory corruption) or possibly have unspecified other impact via unknown vectors, a different vulnerability than CVE-2016-4607, CVE-2016-4609, CVE-2016-4610, and CVE-2016-4612.

CVE-2016-4609.title: libxslt in Apple iOS before 9.3.3, OS X before 10.11.6, iTunes be ...
CVE-2016-4609.description: libxslt in Apple iOS before 9.3.3, OS X before 10.11.6, iTunes before 12.4.2 on Windows, iCloud before 5.2.1 on Windows, tvOS before 9.2.2, and watchOS before 2.2.2 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (memory corruption) or possibly have unspecified other impact via unknown vectors, a different vulnerability than CVE-2016-4607, CVE-2016-4608, CVE-2016-4610, and CVE-2016-4612.

CVE-2016-4610.title: libxslt in Apple iOS before 9.3.3, OS X before 10.11.6, iTunes be ...
CVE-2016-4610.description: libxslt in Apple iOS before 9.3.3, OS X before 10.11.6, iTunes before 12.4.2 on Windows, iCloud before 5.2.1 on Windows, tvOS before 9.2.2, and watchOS before 2.2.2 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (memory corruption) or possibly have unspecified other impact via unknown vectors, a different vulnerability than CVE-2016-4607, CVE-2016-4608, CVE-2016-4609, and CVE-2016-4612.

CVE-2016-4738.title: libxslt in Apple iOS before 10, OS X before 10.12, tvOS before 10 ...
CVE-2016-4738.description: libxslt in Apple iOS before 10, OS X before 10.12, tvOS before 10, and watchOS before 3 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code or cause a denial of service (memory corruption) via a crafted web site.

CVE-2019-11068.title: libxslt through 1.1.33 allows bypass of a protection mechanism be ...
CVE-2019-11068.description: libxslt through 1.1.33 allows bypass of a protection mechanism because callers of xsltCheckRead and xsltCheckWrite permit access even upon receiving a -1 error code. xsltCheckRead can return -1 for a crafted URL that is not actually invalid and is subsequently loaded.

CVE-2019-13117.title: In numbers.c in libxslt 1.1.33, an xsl:number with certain format ...
CVE-2019-13117.description: In numbers.c in libxslt 1.1.33, an xsl:number with certain format strings could lead to a uninitialized read in xsltNumberFormatInsertNumbers. This could allow an attacker to discern whether a byte on the stack contains the characters A, a, I, i, or 0, or any other character.

CVE-2019-13118.title: In numbers.c in libxslt 1.1.33, a type holding grouping character ...
CVE-2019-13118.description: In numbers.c in libxslt 1.1.33, a type holding grouping characters of an xsl:number instruction was too narrow and an invalid character/length combination could be passed to xsltNumberFormatDecimal, leading to a read of uninitialized stack data.

CVE-2019-18197.title: In xsltCopyText in transform.c in libxslt 1.1.33, a pointer varia ...
CVE-2019-18197.description: In xsltCopyText in transform.c in libxslt 1.1.33, a pointer variable isn't reset under certain circumstances. If the relevant memory area happened to be freed and reused in a certain way, a bounds check could fail and memory outside a buffer could be written to, or uninitialized data could be disclosed.

CVE-2023-40403.title: The issue was addressed with improved memory handling. This issue ...
CVE-2023-40403.description: The issue was addressed with improved memory handling. This issue is fixed in macOS Ventura 13.6, tvOS 17, iOS 16.7 and iPadOS 16.7, macOS Monterey 12.7, watchOS 10, iOS 17 and iPadOS 17, macOS Sonoma 14. Processing web content may disclose sensitive information.

CVE-2024-55549.title: xsltGetInheritedNsList in libxslt before 1.1.43 has a use-after-f ...
CVE-2024-55549.description: xsltGetInheritedNsList in libxslt before 1.1.43 has a use-after-free issue related to exclusion of result prefixes.

CVE-2025-10911.title: A use-after-free vulnerability was found in libxslt while parsing ...
CVE-2025-10911.description: A use-after-free vulnerability was found in libxslt while parsing xsl nodes that may lead to the dereference of expired pointers and application crash.

CVE-2025-11731.title: A flaw was found in the exsltFuncResultComp() function of libxslt ...
CVE-2025-11731.description: A flaw was found in the exsltFuncResultComp() function of libxslt, which handles EXSLT <func:result> elements during stylesheet parsing. Due to improper type handling, the function may treat an XML document node as a regular XML element node, resulting in a type confusion. This can cause unexpected memory reads and potential crashes. While difficult to exploit, the flaw could lead to application instability or denial of service.

CVE-2025-24855.title: numbers.c in libxslt before 1.1.43 has a use-after-free because,  ...
CVE-2025-24855.description: numbers.c in libxslt before 1.1.43 has a use-after-free because, in nested XPath evaluations, an XPath context node can be modified but never restored. This is related to xsltNumberFormatGetValue, xsltEvalXPathPredicate, xsltEvalXPathStringNs, and xsltComputeSortResultInternal.

CVE-2025-7424.title: A flaw was found in the libxslt library. The same memory field, p ...
CVE-2025-7424.description: A flaw was found in the libxslt library. The same memory field, psvi, is used for both stylesheet and input data, which can lead to type confusion during XML transformations. This vulnerability allows an attacker to crash the application or corrupt memory. In some cases, it may lead to denial of service or unexpected behavior.

CVE-2025-7425.title: A flaw was found in libxslt where the attribute type, atype, flag ...
CVE-2025-7425.description: A flaw was found in libxslt where the attribute type, atype, flags are modified in a way that corrupts internal memory management. When XSLT functions, such as the key() process, result in tree fragments, this corruption prevents the proper cleanup of ID attributes. As a result, the system may access freed memory, causing crashes or enabling attackers to trigger heap corruption.

CVE-2019-13117.description: In numbers.c in libxslt 1.1.33, an xsl:number with certain format strings could lead to a uninitialized read in xsltNumberFormatInsertNumbers. This could allow an attacker to discern whether a byte on the stack contains the characters A, a, I, i, or 0, or any other character.

CVE-2019-13118.title: In numbers.c in libxslt 1.1.33, a type holding grouping character ...
CVE-2019-13118.description: In numbers.c in libxslt 1.1.33, a type holding grouping characters of an xsl:number instruction was too narrow and an invalid character/length combination could be passed to xsltNumberFormatDecimal, leading to a read of uninitialized stack data.

CVE-2025-10911.title: A use-after-free vulnerability was found in libxslt while parsing ...
CVE-2025-10911.description: A use-after-free vulnerability was found in libxslt while parsing xsl nodes that may lead to the dereference of expired pointers and application crash.

CVE-2025-11731.title: A flaw was found in the exsltFuncResultComp() function of libxslt ...
CVE-2025-11731.description: A flaw was found in the exsltFuncResultComp() function of libxslt, which handles EXSLT <func:result> elements during stylesheet parsing. Due to improper type handling, the function may treat an XML document node as a regular XML element node, resulting in a type confusion. This can cause unexpected memory reads and potential crashes. While difficult to exploit, the flaw could lead to application instability or denial of service.

CVE-2025-24855.title: numbers.c in libxslt before 1.1.43 has a use-after-free because,  ...
CVE-2025-24855.description: numbers.c in libxslt before 1.1.43 has a use-after-free because, in nested XPath evaluations, an XPath context node can be modified but never restored. This is related to xsltNumberFormatGetValue, xsltEvalXPathPredicate, xsltEvalXPathStringNs, and xsltComputeSortResultInternal.

This is related to xsltNumberFormatGetValue, xsltEvalXPathPredicate, xsltEvalXPathStringNs, and xsltComputeSortResultInternal.

CVE-2025-7424.title: A flaw was found in the libxslt library. The same memory field, p ...
CVE-2025-7424.description: A flaw was found in the libxslt library. The same memory field, psvi, is used for both stylesheet and input data, which can lead to type confusion during XML transformations. This vulnerability allows an attacker to crash the application or corrupt memory. In some cases, it may lead to denial of service or unexpected behavior.

CVE-2025-7425.title: A flaw was found in libxslt where the attribute type, atype, flag ...
CVE-2025-7425.description: A flaw was found in libxslt where the attribute type, atype, flags are modified in a way that corrupts internal memory management. When XSLT functions, such as the key() process, result in tree fragments, this corruption prevents the proper cleanup of ID attributes. As a result, the system may access freed memory, causing crashes or enabling attackers to trigger heap corruption.
